prompt: Дай ми поръчките за тази година

steps.sql: SELECT substr(c.signed_at, 1, 7) AS period, SUM(c.amount_eur) AS total_eur, COUNT(*) AS contracts FROM contracts c JOIN tenders t ON t.id = c.tender_id WHERE c.amount_eur IS NOT NULL AND t.procedure_type != 'неизвестна' AND substr(c.signed_at, 1, 4) GLOB '[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]' AND c.signed_at >= '2026-01-01' AND c.signed_at < '2026-07-03' GROUP BY period ORDER BY period LIMIT 12

emit.title: Поръчки за 2026
emit.question: Дай ми поръчките за тази година
